en_title: Micron CEO Expects RAM Shortage to Last Through 2027, Start to Ease in 2028
cn_title: 美光CEO：内存短缺至2027年，2028年起缓解
subtitle: 内存荒未尽
opus_summary: 美光CEO称内存短缺将持续至2027年，游戏硬件价格高企，Steam Machine首发价从750涨至1050美元(约合人民币7150元)。

paragraphs.en: Micron, one of the largest global manufacturers of memory, expects the ongoing RAM shortage to last through 2027. That's according to Micron CEO Sanjay Mehrotra, who said in the company's Q3 2026 earnings report today that the unprecedented demand facing the semiconductor industry isn't letting up any time soon.
paragraphs.cn: 美光是全球最大的存储器制造商之一，预计当前的内存短缺将持续到2027年。据美光CEO Sanjay Mehrotra在公司2026财年第三季度财报中透露，半导体行业面临的前所未有的需求不会很快缓解。

paragraphs.en: "We expect tight conditions to persist beyond calendar 2027 as a result of AI-driven demand across all segments coupled with structural supply constraints," Mehrotra said.
paragraphs.cn: Mehrotra表示：「我们预计，由于所有细分市场的AI驱动需求以及结构性供应限制，供应紧张状况将持续到2027年以后。」

paragraphs.en: Semiconductors, the chips used to manufacture computer hardware like RAM , the VRAM in graphics cards , and SSDs , have increased significantly in price over the last few years, primarily due to demand for their use in AI data centers. Micron itself exited the consumer market late last year, ending support for its consumer-facing brand Crucial, which made several of our favorite SSDs and RAM kits, in favor of its booming data center-focused business.
paragraphs.cn: 半导体是用于制造计算机硬件（如内存、显卡中的显存和固态硬盘）的芯片，过去几年价格大幅上涨，主要是由于AI数据中心对其的需求。美光本身也在去年底退出了消费市场，停止了对面向消费者的品牌Crucial的支持，转而专注于蓬勃发展的数据中心业务。Crucial曾生产过多款我们最喜欢的SSD和内存条。

paragraphs.en: As a result, many components and systems used to build gaming hardware – ranging from RAM sticks alone all the way up to full systems like the PS5 , Xbox Series X , and Steam Machine – have also ballooned in price. The Steam Machine in particular was originally supposed to be priced at around $750 , but instead launched at $1,050 due to the cost of the underlying hardware.
paragraphs.cn: 结果，用于构建游戏硬件的许多组件和系统——从单条内存条到像PS5、XBOX Series X和Steam Machine这样的完整系统——价格也水涨船高。尤其是Steam Machine，原本预计定价约750美元(约合人民币5108元)，但由于底层硬件成本，实际发售价格达到了1050美元(约合人民币7150元)。

paragraphs.en: Mehrotra's comments unfortunately mean the RAMpocalypse isn't ending anytime soon, and we can expect these elevated hardware prices to stick around.
paragraphs.cn: 不幸的是，Mehrotra的言论意味着「内存大灾难」不会很快结束，我们可以预期这些高企的硬件价格将持续下去。

paragraphs.en: "Even as we expect industry supply to improve gradually in 2028, we currently do not have line of sight as to when memory supply will be able to catch up with increasing demand," Mehrotra said.
paragraphs.cn: Mehrotra表示：「尽管我们预计2028年行业供应将逐步改善，但目前我们尚不清楚内存供应何时才能赶上日益增长的需求。」

paragraphs.en: While only time will tell, the way things are going certainly doesn't bode well for the inevitable PlayStation 6 or Xbox Project Helix launching at an affordable price point.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然只有时间能给出答案，但当前的形势显然不利于未来必然推出的PS6或XBOX Project Helix以亲民价格发售。

paragraphs.en: Bo Moore is IGN's Senior Manager of Tech. You can find him online @usebomswisely.
paragraphs.cn: Bo Moore是IGN科技部高级经理。你可以在网上通过@usebomswisely找到他。
